subcodes.first_line: O imminent victory! From the ocean of grace thou hast drawn thy portion, and from the Kingdom of the Unseen thou hast, beyond doubt, received thy share - a fire from the flame of Moses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فتح قریب از بحر فیض نصیب بردی و از ملکوت غیب بهره بی ریب آتشی از نار موسی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
